name: @yah/cloud-worker
description: Pond local-sim harness. Holds miniflare-sim.mjs (the workerd sim shim the pond reconciler spawns) and the vendored router.bundle.js. The bundle is NOT built here — it is the compiled @mesofact/edge artifact, vendored by scripts/check-worker-bundle.sh (W270 §3, R595-F3). miniflare is kept as the pond sim's runtime.
